name: mosaictv
description: Turn your media library into scheduled 24/7 live TV channels with bumpers, filler, overlays, and M3U/XMLTV output.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix web install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix web run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix web run build && npm --prefix server run build
